description_long: This is a muscular adult male with a distinctive urban style, featuring a sleeveless high-collar vest adorned with a colorful, patterned design and the word 'Supreme' on the chest. His arms are heavily tattooed with intricate designs, and he wears fingerless gloves on both hands. He is dressed in fitted, light-colored cargo pants with visible pockets and black, high-top footwear. His face is partially covered by a mask, and he sports a prominent mohawk hairstyle. The overall appearance suggests a confident, streetwise individual, likely to be seen in modern urban environments.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male in a sleeveless patterned vest, cargo pants, gloves, and high-top footwear, with a mohawk and face mask.
description_view_0: Back view showing the sleeveless vest's colorful pattern, tattoos on both arms, and the mohawk hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm tattoos, glove, and the profile of the mohawk and mask.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'Supreme' logo on the vest, full tattoos, gloves, and facial mask.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the tattoos, glove, and the mohawk's profile.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless high-collar vest, fitted cargo pants, fingerless gloves, face mask
